name: conform-patched-deps-no-newline
description: Drop-in PM conformance fixture for issue #25: a pnpm patchedDependencies patch whose final hunk context line is the patched file's last line with NO trailing newline, and pnpm omits the `\ No newline at end of file` marker. is-odd@3.0.1's README.md ends without a trailing newline. pnpm + GNU patch apply this; git apply (and a strict applier) reject it with `error applying hunk #1`. nub must apply it with pnpm's tolerance so a pnpm-patched dep that installs under pnpm also installs under nub.
